bulletins.title: Military Debt Forgiveness Scams
bulletins.summary: Scammers target service members and veterans with phone calls offering fake military debt forgiveness or relief programs. They pressure victims into paying them directly under the guise of resolving their outstanding loans.
phrases: enroll in a special military debt

bulletins.title: Fake Jury Duty Arrest Threats
bulletins.summary: Scammers call and text victims claiming they missed jury duty and face immediate arrest. They send official-looking fake warrants and demand immediate payment of a fine to clear the warrant.

bulletins.title: FTC Impersonators Sending Fake Photo IDs
bulletins.summary: Scammers text victims pretending to be FTC agents offering to help recover money lost in previous scams. In a new twist, they text fake photo IDs to 'verify' their identity and gain the victim's trust.

gemini_context_snippet: This week's focus is on high-pressure impersonation tactics, including fake FTC agents texting photo IDs to 'verify' identity and offer scam recovery, callers threatening arrest for missed jury duty, and fraudulent military debt forgiveness offers targeting service members.
